_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: after p-value adjustment, PERADIGM identified only NF1 as a statistically significant gene associated with NF1-specific phenotypes, consistent with SKAT-O results
details: For NF1, identified only NF1 gene as statistically significant after p-value adjustment, consistent with SKAT-O results
